name: glaurung-a0-source-backed-policy-differences-v1-exhaustive-review
review_policy: Classify the exact recorded instruction, not a later use of the loaded value. Fixed IRP, IO_STACK_LOCATION, and METHOD_BUFFERED SystemBuffer field accesses are request plumbing unless the instruction directly presents an already validated sink; a source vulnerability elsewhere in the basic block does not turn a fixed-buffer load into an independent arbitrary-memory primitive.

sites.machine_evidence: Loads IoControlCode from the current IO_STACK_LOCATION at fixed offset 0x18; it does not dereference an attacker-selected address.
Loads CreateDisposition from fixed SystemBuffer offset 0x204 for the already validated ZwCreateFile operation at 0x36def1138.
Loads DesiredAccess from fixed SystemBuffer offset 0x200 for the already validated ZwCreateFile operation at 0x36def1138.
Loads BufferSize from fixed SystemBuffer offset 0x210 for the already validated ZwWriteFile operation at 0x36def12f7.
Loads Buffer from fixed SystemBuffer offset 0x208 for the already validated ZwWriteFile operation at 0x36def12f7; this load itself is not an arbitrary-address read.
Loads IoControlCode from the current IO_STACK_LOCATION at fixed offset 0x18.
Loads Count from fixed SystemBuffer offset 0 for the already validated unchecked multiply at 0x2253a105a.
Loads ElemSize from fixed SystemBuffer offset 4 for the already validated unchecked multiply at 0x2253a105a.
Reloads Count from the kernel-owned METHOD_BUFFERED copy for the already validated unchecked multiply at 0x2253a1092; this is not a user-racy double fetch.
Reloads ElemSize from the kernel-owned METHOD_BUFFERED copy for the already validated unchecked multiply at 0x2253a1092; this is not a user-racy double fetch.
Calls memcpy with the unchecked recomputed length already represented by the validated integer-overflow row at 0x2253a1092; the source is the fixed SystemBuffer pointer.
Loads IoControlCode from the current IO_STACK_LOCATION at fixed offset 0x18.
Loads Size from fixed SystemBuffer offset 8 for the already validated MmMapIoSpace call at 0x2a092109f.
Loads PhysicalAddress from fixed SystemBuffer offset 0 for the already validated MmMapIoSpace call at 0x2a092109f.
Writes the mapped-address result to fixed SystemBuffer offset 0x10; the destination address is the I/O-manager-owned buffer, not attacker-selected memory.
Reloads Size from the kernel-owned METHOD_BUFFERED request for MmUnmapIoSpace cleanup; it is not a user-racy double fetch or arbitrary-address read.
Loads Size from fixed SystemBuffer offset 8 while constructing ZwMapViewOfSection arguments; the recorded instruction is a bounded request-field access.
Loads PhysicalAddress from fixed SystemBuffer offset 0 while constructing ZwMapViewOfSection arguments; the recorded instruction is not an arbitrary-address read.
Loads Size from fixed SystemBuffer offset 0x10 for the already validated arbitrary-copy memcpy at 0x2a09211bc.
Loads SourceAddress from fixed SystemBuffer offset 8 for the already validated arbitrary-copy memcpy at 0x2a09211bc.
Loads TargetAddress from fixed SystemBuffer offset 0 for the already validated arbitrary-copy memcpy at 0x2a09211bc.
Loads OutputBufferLength from the fixed IO_STACK_LOCATION to populate IoStatus.Information.
Loads IoControlCode from the current IO_STACK_LOCATION at fixed offset 0x18.
Loads ExitStatus from fixed SystemBuffer offset 0x18 for the already validated ZwTerminateProcess call at 0x1cbe110b2.
Loads ProcessHandle from fixed SystemBuffer offset 0 for the already validated ZwTerminateProcess call at 0x1cbe110b2.
Loads ProcessId from fixed SystemBuffer offset 8 into a local CLIENT_ID; the recorded instruction does not dereference an attacker-selected address.
Loads DesiredAccess from fixed SystemBuffer offset 0xc for a zero/default test while constructing ZwOpenProcess arguments.
Reloads DesiredAccess from the kernel-owned METHOD_BUFFERED copy after the zero test; it is not a user-racy double fetch.
Writes the returned process handle to fixed SystemBuffer offset 0; the destination is the I/O-manager-owned buffer.
Loads ProcessId from fixed SystemBuffer offset 8 for PsLookupProcessByProcessId; the recorded instruction is a request-field access.
Writes the returned process pointer to fixed SystemBuffer offset 0x10; the destination address is not attacker selected.

Loads ProcessObject from fixed SystemBuffer offset 0x10 for a null test. The later ObDereferenceObject use is security-sensitive, but this recorded instruction is not itself an arbitrary-address read.
Reloads ProcessObject from the kernel-owned METHOD_BUFFERED copy for ObDereferenceObject. It is neither a user-racy double fetch nor an arbitrary read at this VA.
Loads the fixed SystemBuffer pointer from IRP offset 0x18; the request-buffer address is I/O-manager owned.
Loads the MSR Index from fixed SystemBuffer offset 0 immediately before the already validated rdmsr instruction at 0x32bd6103e.
Writes the low rdmsr result to fixed SystemBuffer offset 4; this is part of the already validated RDMSR information-return path, not an arbitrary-address write.
Writes the high rdmsr result to fixed SystemBuffer offset 8; this is part of the already validated RDMSR information-return path, not an arbitrary-address write.
Writes the constant response length 12 to Irp IoStatus.Information at fixed offset 0x38.
Loads IoControlCode from the current IO_STACK_LOCATION at fixed offset 0x18.
Loads Callback from fixed SystemBuffer offset 0 immediately before the already validated attacker-controlled indirect call at 0x20ec71054.
Loads IoControlCode from the current IO_STACK_LOCATION at fixed offset 0x18.
Loads InputBufferLength from fixed IO_STACK_LOCATION offset 0x10 for the already validated unbounded stack copy at 0x397ba106b.
Calls memcpy at the exact already validated stack-overflow sink; this varying arbitrary-read label is a duplicate presentation, not a distinct vulnerability.
